title: Exploratory clinical pilot reporting updated
summary: The public project report now separates the Hospital da Luz exploratory pilot from earlier peer-reviewed evidence and states the study's sample and limitations.

title: Study on personalized AI explanations published
summary: The International Journal of Human-Computer Studies published research examining communication adapted to clinicians' expertise levels.

title: Personalized agent communication presented at CHI 2023
summary: The CHI study investigated how assertive and suggestive AI communication can affect clinician performance and receptiveness.

title: External breast-density validation presented at ECR 2023
summary: A retrospective external validation evaluated an open-source deep learning model using 3,356 mammograms from 839 patients.

title: BreastScreening-AI clinical interaction study published
summary: Artificial Intelligence in Medicine published the evaluation of clinician-only and clinician-AI scenarios involving 45 clinicians from nine institutions.
